title: For School Students (Classes 6–12)
heroTitle: Make AI and tech click — without the jargon
heroSubtitle: An 8-day friendly program with fun analogies, safe AI tool use, and a hands-on showcase project.
benefits: Understand AI concepts with everyday analogies
Build confidence before exams and projects
Learn how to ask better questions about technology
examples: How ChatGPT is like a very well-read friend
Why your phone knows what song you like
What 'training data' means in plain English

title: For College Engineers
heroTitle: Go beyond tutorials — build real understanding
heroSubtitle: A 10-day intensive from LLM fundamentals to portfolio projects and interview prep.
benefits: Understand how modern AI systems actually work
Develop frameworks for debugging and design
Prepare for internships and technical interviews
examples: When to use fine-tuning vs. RAG
System design mental models for scalable apps

title: For Product Managers
heroTitle: Master AI-powered product management — from discovery to MVP launch
heroSubtitle: A 16-day program built for PMs who want to lead with AI tools, ship real products, and drive growth with confidence.
benefits: Build an AI-first PM workflow with the right tool stack
Run AI-powered discovery, PRDs, and roadmap planning
Ship a working MVP using vibe coding — no deep coding required
Launch, measure, and present your product on Capstone Demo Day
examples: AI-assisted market research and competitor analysis
Writing PRDs and user stories with Claude as co-pilot
Building MVPs with Lovable, Bolt, and Replit
